command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, CHARACTER_SET_NAME, COLLATION_NAME
FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'anuncios' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'cliente';
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	CHARACTER_SET_NAME	COLLATION_NAME
cliente	utf8mb4	utf8mb4_bin
